component.name: Flow
component.summary: Connect the dots, fill the board

description.p: A pipe-connection puzzle game. Drag between matching pairs of colored dots to connect them; pipes may not cross, and every cell of the board must be filled to win.

ul.li: Endless generated puzzles, 5×5 to 10×10 — always solvable, never wandering pipes
10 level packs with 165 fixed levels, including shaped boards: rectangles, crosses, octagons, courtyards
Daily puzzle sets seeded from the date, with a streak counter
Touch-friendly adaptive layout for phones and desktops

description.p: Board drags no longer trigger the back-swipe gesture, and a new option (on by default) protects completed pipes from being cut by accidental swipes.
